name: Red Cabbage2
recipeIngredient: 1 Apple; Large, Tart (or ½ cup Applesauce)
recipeInstructions:
1. Core and peel the apple, then finely chop it.
2. Heat oil in a Dutch oven and sauté onions for 3 minutes.
3. Add cabbage and immediately pour vinegar over cabbage to prevent color loss.
4. Sprinkle with salt and sugar.
5. Add chopped apple or applesauce and a piece of salt pork.
6. Pour in red wine and hot beef broth.
7. Cover and simmer for 45 to 60 minutes, until cabbage is just tender but not soft.
8. Shortly before the end of cooking time, remove the salt pork; cube it and return it to the cabbage if desired.
9. Adjust seasoning as needed and serve.
